channel.title: NetNewsWire Betas
channel.description: Most recent NetNewsWire changes with links to updates.

item.title: NetNewsWire 7.0.4b2
item.description:
Changes:

  • New iCloud sync feature — Window > iCloud Storage Stats. Allows you to view stats and clean up storage. More details here: How to Optimize iCloud Syncing
  • iCloud account now does weekly cleanups in the background, which will help with syncing performance and with lowering iCloud storage use

item.title: NetNewsWire 6.2.1
item.description:
Changes since 6.2:

  • Fixed some crashing bugs
  • Fixed a bug where, on some Macs, the user couldn’t select an OPML file to import
